untranslatable_reason: Calendar-based entry/exit conditions (specific dates April 13 and April 25) cannot be expressed using technical indicators and standard operators. The operator 'is' is designed for regime comparisons, not calendar date matching. A calendar/date filter must be implemented at the backtest engine level, not within the indicator-based rule system.
translation_notes: Signal is a pure calendar spread trade with no technical conditions. Entry: 1 contract RB at close on April 13 (or next trading day if holiday). Exit: 1 contract RB at close on April 25 (or previous trading day if holiday). Hold period: ~12 calendar days. Backtest period: 1995-2008. This requires explicit date-based filtering outside the standard indicator rule framework.
